response.overview: The story is set around the main characters, a pair of best friends, Zaim and Afzan who have been close friends and work at the same company. Their friendship, like others, has its ups and downs. Unfortunately, fate decrees that they both are involved in a road accident and Afzan dies. Meanwhile, Zaim is in critical condition and requires specialist assistance. Afzan's wife, Iman, decides to take over all of Afzan's responsibilities as Project Director. She does not believe that anyone else would be capable of taking on the burden of work left by her late husband. Meanwhile, their daughter Puteri often misses her late father. Iman asks Zaim for help to persuade Puteri. Puteri calls Zaim "papa". Zaim's wife, Hani, is Iman's best friend. Hani suspects that Zaim has a relationship with Iman. Iman, unknowingly, constantly imagines Zaim as Afzan. What is the outcome of their three-way relationship?
response.title: Ralat
